name: Pinterest WF0 - Prepare Product Photo Pins

parameters.content:
## Pinterest WF0 — Prepare Product Photo Pins (daily)

**What it does:** scans the `23Auto pinterest photo` Drive folder (Root → Category → images), matches each image filename to a Product No. in the matching category tab of the main product sheet, uploads new (not-yet-pinned) images to Shopify Files for a stable CDN URL, has AI write a Pinterest title/description/alt per photo, and appends review rows to the **Pinterest2:3 Pins** tab — linking to the live **Shopify product page** instead of a blog post. Board is auto-assigned from the `Tailwind Boards` tab, and `Approval` is set to `Approved` automatically -- no manual review step before Tailwind picks these up.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation stagedUploadsCreate($input: [StagedUploadInput!]!) { stagedUploadsCreate(input: $input) { stagedTargets { url resourceUrl parameters { name value } } userErrors { field message } } }', variables: { input: [{ resource: 'IMAGE', filename: $('🔁 Iterate Final Images').item.json.fileName, mimeType: $('🔁 Iterate Final Images').item.json.mimeType || 'image/jpeg', httpMethod: 'POST' }] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation fileCreate($files: [FileCreateInput!]!) { fileCreate(files: $files) { files { id alt fileStatus } userErrors { field message } } }', variables: { files: [{ alt: $('🔁 Iterate Final Images').item.json.productNo, contentType: 'IMAGE', originalSource: $('🎯 Staged Create').item.json.data.stagedUploadsCreate.stagedTargets[0].resourceUrl }] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'query getFiles($ids: [ID!]!) { nodes(ids: $ids) { ... on GenericFile { id alt fileStatus url } ... on MediaImage { id alt fileStatus image { url width height } } } }', variables: { ids: [ ($('📎 File Create').item.json.data && $('📎 File Create').item.json.data.fileCreate && $('📎 File Create').item.json.data.fileCreate.files && $('📎 File Create').item.json.data.fileCreate.files[0] && $('📎 File Create').item.json.data.fileCreate.files[0].id) || '' ] } }) }}
